title: arctostaphylos × laxiflora
intro: Arctostaphylos × laxiflora is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Arctostaphylos uva-ursi and Arctostaphylos glauca, commonly known as bearberry or kinnikinnick. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high tannin content, which has been shown to have antimicrobial and astringent properties. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos × laxiflora include its ability to help support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Arctostaphylos × laxiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other related issues.
